description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the default Auto DevOps Docker image with the docker:24-dind service and defines the stages build, test, review, staging, canary, production, and cleanup. Add a .canary job that runs in the canary stage, is manual, and only executes on the master branch when a Kubernetes cluster is active. The job runs the following shell commands in order: check_kube_domain, install_dependencies, download_chart, ensure_namespace, install_tiller, create_secret, and deploy canary (which performs a helm upgrade --install with image repository $CI_APPLICATION_REPOSITORY, tag $CI_APPLICATION_TAG, database URL, replica count, and PostgreSQL settings into the $KUBE_NAMESPACE namespace). The job relies on Auto DevOps variables such as CI_APPLICATION_REPOSITORY, CI_APPLICATION_TAG, POSTGRES_USER, POSTGRES_PASSWORD, POSTGRES_DB, KUBE_NAMESPACE, and AUTO_DEVOPS_DOMAIN, and pushes the built Docker image to the GitLab Container Registry before deployment.
